title: Crispy Claypot Bread
description: A crispy, savory bread dish baked in a claypot, perfect for a comforting meal. This Japanese-inspired recipe combines the crunch of crispy bread with the rich flavors of a claypot.
instructions: Slice the bread into 1-inch thick slices.
In a bowl, whisk together the winey and crispy. Add the sliced bread and toss to coat.
Transfer the bread mixture to a claypot or small baking dish.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the bread is crispy and golden brown.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with additional crispy if desired.
